title: April 30
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 30''' is the 120th day of the year (121st in leap years), with 245 days remaining, as the last day in April.
</noinclude>
*[[1910s#1916|1916]] – [[Phil Brown]] is born.
*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[Perry King]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 114|''Star Wars Weekly'' 114]] published.
*[[1996]] – [[Heir to the Empire 6|''Heir to the Empire'' 6]] published.
*[[1998]] – [[Star Wars Insider 37|''Star Wars Insider'' 37]] published.
*[[1999]] – [[Celebration (1999)|Celebration]] is held in Denver, Colorado for three days to celebrate the future release of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].
*1999 – [[Star Wars Insider 43|''Star Wars Insider'' 43]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Republic 53|''Republic'' 53]] published.
*[[2004]] – "[[Tinian on Trial]]" archived on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] [[Fiction]].
*[[2007]] – [https://www.jedipedia.fi Jedipedia], the Finnish ''Star Wars'' wiki, is founded.
*[[2008]] – [[Rebellion 13|''Rebellion'' 13]] published.
*[[2010]] – "[[R2 Come Home]]" and "[[Lethal Trackdown]]" air on [[Cartoon Network]], ending the [[The Clone Wars: Season Two|second season]] of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''.
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars Insider 141|''Star Wars Insider'' 141]] published.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars: Dark Times Volume Seven—A Spark Remains|''Star Wars: Dark Times: A Spark Remains'' trade paperback]] published.
*2014 – [[Rebel Heist 1|''Rebel Heist'' 1]] released.
*[[2019]] – [[Peter Mayhew]] dies.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: Alien Archive]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Dooku: Jedi Lost]]'' released.
*[[2024]] – [[Star Wars: The High Republic - Shadows of Starlight|''Star Wars: The High Republic - Shadows of Starlight'' trade paperback]] published.
*2024 – [[Star Wars Insider 225]] published.
*2024 – ''[[Obi-Wan Kenobi: The Complete Series]]'' released.
*2024 – ''[[Andor: The Complete First Season]]'' released.
*2024 - [[Maria De Aragon]] dies.
*[[2025]] – [[Hyperspace Stories—Codebreaker 1|''Hyperspace Stories—Codebreaker'' 1]] published.
*2025 – [[The High Republic – Fear of the Jedi 3|''The High Republic – Fear of the Jedi'' 3]] published.
*2025 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 17|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 17]] published.
*2025 – ''[[The High Republic Adventures Phase III - The Battle of Eriadu]]'' published.
*2025 – [[The Rise of Skywalker Adaptation 3|''The Rise of Skywalker Adaptation'' 3]] published.
<noinclude>
